news.title: Unisplendour Unveils Titan Series High-Performance FPGA Family
news.summary: New Titan series delivers up to 180K logic elements and 16.2Gbps transceivers, targeting communications, industrial, and data center applications.

content.text: Unisplendour has officially launched its flagship Titan series FPGA family, representing a significant advancement in domestic FPGA technology. The Titan series is designed to meet the growing demand for high-performance programmable logic solutions in China's rapidly expanding semiconductor market.
Advanced Architecture and Performance

The Titan series features a cutting-edge architecture with up to 180,000 logic elements, 600 DSP slices, and 16 high-speed transceivers capable of 16.2Gbps operation. This performance level positions the Titan series as a competitive alternative to international FPGA vendors for demanding applications.
Key Applications
Development Ecosystem

The Titan series is supported by Unisplendour's Pango Design Suite, providing a complete development environment with synthesis, implementation, and debugging tools. The company has also established partnerships with leading IP vendors to provide a rich ecosystem of verified IP cores.

news.author: Unisplendour Marketing

news.title: THD89 Security Chip Achieves CC EAL6+ Certification
news.summary: Unisplendour's flagship secure microcontroller receives highest Common Criteria security certification, reinforcing leadership in financial security chips.

content.text: Unisplendour announced today that its THD89 secure microcontroller has successfully achieved Common Criteria Evaluation Assurance Level 6+ (CC EAL6+) certification. This milestone establishes THD89 as one of the most secure microcontrollers available in the market.
Rigorous Security Evaluation

The CC EAL6+ certification involved comprehensive security evaluation including formal design verification, extensive penetration testing, and rigorous assessment of the chip's resistance to advanced physical attacks. This certification level is typically required for high-security government and financial applications.
Market Impact

With this certification, Unisplendour strengthens its position in the secure chip market, particularly for banking and payment applications. The THD89 is now qualified for use in the most demanding security environments including central bank digital currency (CBDC) implementations.

Achieving CC EAL6+ certification demonstrates our commitment to providing world-class security solutions. This milestone reflects years of investment in security architecture and rigorous quality processes.
content.author: Dr. Li Wei, Chief Technology Officer

news.author: Unisplendour Security Division

news.title: Unisplendour Chips Power 10 Million Smart Meters for State Grid
news.summary: Major milestone reached as Unisplendour's metering ICs achieve widespread deployment in China's national smart grid infrastructure.

content.text: Unisplendour has achieved a significant milestone with its USPM6530 three-phase metering IC and related power management chips now deployed in over 10 million smart electricity meters across China's State Grid Corporation infrastructure.
Reliability and Performance

The deployment represents years of reliable operation in the field, with the metering ICs maintaining Class 0.5S accuracy over a wide temperature range and under varying grid conditions. The chips have demonstrated exceptional reliability with a field failure rate below 50 parts per million.
Technical Advantages
This large-scale deployment validates Unisplendour's capability to deliver industrial-grade semiconductor solutions for critical infrastructure applications.

news.author: Unisplendour Industrial Division

news.title: Unisplendour Expands Automotive Semiconductor Portfolio
news.summary: New AEC-Q100 qualified products target growing automotive electronics market including EV power management and ADAS applications.

content.text: Unisplendour has announced the expansion of its automotive semiconductor portfolio with multiple new products qualified to AEC-Q100 standards. This expansion addresses the rapidly growing demand for semiconductors in electric vehicles and advanced driver assistance systems.
New Automotive Products

The expanded portfolio includes automotive-grade power management ICs, motor drivers, and FPGA products designed specifically for the harsh automotive environment. All products undergo rigorous qualification testing including high-temperature operating life, temperature cycling, and ESD testing.
Key Applications

items: Battery management systems for electric vehicles
Motor control for HVAC and thermal management

content.text: Unisplendour is also pursuing ISO 26262 functional safety certification for selected products to support safety-critical automotive applications.

news.author: Unisplendour Automotive Team

news.title: Unisplendour Invests $500M in Advanced Process R&D
news.summary: Major investment to accelerate development of next-generation FPGA and security chip technologies at 28nm and 14nm process nodes.

content.text: Unisplendour announced a $500 million investment over the next three years to advance its semiconductor technology roadmap. The investment will focus on developing next-generation FPGA and security chip products using advanced process technologies.
Technology Roadmap

The investment will accelerate the development of 28nm FPGA products planned for 2025 and establish the foundation for 14nm products in the following years. This roadmap will significantly enhance Unisplendour's competitive position in the high-performance FPGA market.
Research Focus Areas

items: Advanced FPGA architecture with AI/ML acceleration

content.text: The investment will also expand Unisplendour's engineering team by 500 additional R&D personnel across its Beijing, Shanghai, and Xi'an design centers.

news.author: Unisplendour Corporate Communications

news.title: Unisplendour Partners with Major Cloud Provider for Smart Card Services
news.summary: Strategic partnership to provide secure element solutions for cloud-based digital identity and authentication services.

content.text: Unisplendour has entered into a strategic partnership with one of China's leading cloud service providers to supply THD series security chips for cloud-based identity and authentication solutions.
Cloud Security Integration

The partnership will integrate Unisplendour's hardware security modules with the cloud provider's identity management platform, offering enterprise customers enhanced security for cloud workloads and data protection.
Market Expansion

This collaboration marks Unisplendour's entry into the cloud security market, expanding beyond traditional smart card applications into cloud-native security services. The partnership is expected to generate significant revenue growth in the coming years.
This partnership demonstrates the versatility of our security chip technology and its applicability to emerging cloud computing security requirements.
content.author: Zhang Ming, VP of Sales

news.author: Unisplendour Business Development

news.title: Unisplendour Wins National Semiconductor Innovation Award
news.summary: Recognized for breakthrough achievements in domestic FPGA technology and contribution to China's semiconductor self-sufficiency.

content.text: Unisplendour has been honored with the National Semiconductor Innovation Award by the China Semiconductor Industry Association, recognizing the company's significant contributions to advancing domestic FPGA and security chip technologies.
Award Recognition

The award specifically acknowledges Unisplendour's breakthrough in developing high-performance FPGA products that compete with international vendors, as well as the company's leadership in secure chip technology for financial applications.
Industry Impact

Unisplendour's achievements have helped reduce China's dependence on imported semiconductors in critical areas including financial security, industrial control, and telecommunications infrastructure. The company's products are now deployed in numerous strategic national projects.
Future Commitment
In accepting the award, Unisplendour's CEO reaffirmed the company's commitment to continued innovation and investment in R&D to further strengthen China's semiconductor capabilities.

news.author: Unisplendour Corporate Communications

news.title: Unisplendour Expands International Presence with Southeast Asia Partnerships
news.summary: New distribution agreements in Thailand, Vietnam, and Indonesia to support growing demand for security and industrial chips in Southeast Asian markets.

content.text: Unisplendour is accelerating its international expansion with new distribution partnerships across Southeast Asia, targeting the region's growing demand for secure payment solutions and industrial automation components.
Regional Market Focus

The partnerships will focus on key growth markets including Thailand's digital payment infrastructure, Vietnam's manufacturing automation sector, and Indonesia's smart city initiatives. Local technical support teams will be established to provide application engineering assistance.
Product Localization

Unisplendour is adapting its product offerings to meet regional requirements, including support for local payment standards and industrial communication protocols. The company is also establishing local inventory hubs to ensure rapid delivery.

This expansion represents Unisplendour's strategy to diversify its revenue base beyond the domestic Chinese market while leveraging its competitive technology advantages in security and industrial applications.

news.author: Unisplendour International Sales
